# Transcript
RCONTOS
*RISTONIKOS ARI
*N***HI AGAQHI TOY DHMO*
AQHNAI H QYSIA WS KALLIST
IKROIS KAI PROSODOS WS PLE*
*S DEDOCQAI TOIS NOMOQET
*AN DEK* *MERAIS PROTERON N
A ETH KATA DIKLHRIAN TWI TO P
OTERWI ETEI H WI AN H DA
SQWTAI* EGGYHTAS LAMBANO*
* *ENTHKOSTHN PWLEIN THN EN T*
* TOYS DE PRYTANEIS PROGRAFEI
N MISQWSIN THS NEAS D*ARRHDHN
THN PRASIN THS EN THI NEAI CWRI
SODOS GENHTAI DYOIN TALA*TO
WN KTHMATWN TWN EN THI NE*
PXEIN THI AQHNAI TOYTO
*QHNAIWN TWN MIKRWN T
*IZONTWN AYTO EIS TA*
ON D EINAI KAI TOM PRO
AI MISQOYN KAQO
I TON DE TAMIAN
ONTASTHS
# Lines: x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 x4 y4
